email-reset-code-instructions: You will receive an email with a "reset code." Enter that code here, then enter your new password.
sign-in-new-password: You can now sign in with your new password.
email-login-code: Check your email for a login code and enter it here.
enter-email-for-reset: Enter the email you used to create your account. We'll send you a "reset code" so you can set a new password.
